message:
feat(mux): improve loading and empty states UI

1. Add animated spinner to "Connecting..." loading state
2. Add "No Open Tabs" welcome screen with keyboard shortcuts:
   - ⌘/ New Tab
   - ⌘D Split Right
   - ⌘⇧D Split Down
   - ⌘` Quick Terminal
   - ⌘⇧P Command Palette
3. Fix panel_list handling - was only in JSON handler but server
   sends it as binary (0x01)
4. Add debug logs for panel creation and frame rendering

The empty state shows when there are no tabs (fresh start or all
tabs closed). It helps users discover available keyboard shortcuts.
